name: Cherry-Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the package directions.
2. Pour the mixture into two greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pans.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
4. Cool completely.
5. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and sugar until fluffy; fold in the whipped cream.
6. Spread over each cake layer.
7. Top with cherry pie filling.
8. Chill for 4 hours or overnight.
Yield: 24-30 servings
